title: Endfield Update Screen
description: Transform your ordinary background to Arknights: Endfield's update screen!
body:
![The logo of this resource pack. ](https://cdn-alt.modrinth.com/data/GXjKolBE/images/e3817f7dd7652c7f6d5c3939feefc717bd47a475.png)
![The effect of this pack, to change the overlay of panoramas in the title screen.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GXjKolBE/images/8b961a9c02f759b8cbe6d6309efa1470c68e65b3.png)

# What does this pack do?
It changes the overlay of the panorama, transforming normal Minecraft background image into the style of  the loading screen of **Arknights: Endfield**.

This pack demonstrates a sample of modding the file `panorama_overlay.png`, while keeping the dynamic effect of the panorama.

It also includes the panoramas of The End, originating from a joke between Endfield and Minecraft communities.

This pack removed the Minecraft logo and splash texts to resemble Endfield.

You can remove the internal panorama to let the overlay directly apply Minecraft's panorama.

![The content of the pack. You can remove the internal panoramas to let the overlay directly apply Minecraft's panorama](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/506c837799f24f444a7b904bd6e104d990224122_0.webp)

# Version support
Works fine on Minecraft Java Edition 1.13.x and later. Best with 1.20.5+, which changes the logic of the background.

Special builds after the year 2019, like 3D Shareware v1.34 and 24w14potato, should be supported. 25w14craftmine is not supported, unfortunately.

Won't work on Minecraft 1.12.2 and older. These versions simply hard-coded the overlay in the code and are impossible to change by a resource pack.

![1.20.5+ effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0f9b16dd8e0a27a5e885446dbdbdae2621f0d740.jpeg)

![Endfield in 1994!](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/GXjKolBE/images/be13bf8ffd92b1442379b547b8c05f5ba4113997.png)



# So why?
For demonstrate propose? We don't know. Just for fun, may be.

![Trying to search the Chinese name of Endfield on a music platform will surprising get C418 - The End.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/43c116ffc83287a07681f1f8544d6d9d862ba593.png)

![After the release of Arknights:Endfield, the official channel of Minecraft China responses this.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/562ceee31b220b1fb1be2452cae0373239b54c7a.jpeg)
